data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed), but there is no evidence provided that confirms the existence or functionality of this workflow. The prior steps focus on creating offers and handling bookings, but do not address the specific need for tracking claim statuses. This indicates a clear gap in the implementation of the required functionality.
gaps: Lack of evidence for claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed).

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for claim status workflow
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the claim status workflow.
